mapper.select:
SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.outCnt, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.outCnt * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM (SELECT SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7) AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7)) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7) AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, co.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(co.BRCD, '-', co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 FROM CARD_OUTPUT ci INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7) ) sub

SELECT SUBSTRING(bi.BASE_YM, 5) AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN bo.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt, ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (SUM(CASE WHEN bo.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM BILL_INPUT bi LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT bo ON bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN AND bi.BASE_YM = bo.BASE_YM AND bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(bi.BASE_YM, 5)

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per FROM ( SELECT SUBSTRING(bi.BASE_YM, 5) AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN bi.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(bi.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON, bo.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, sum(CASE WHEN bi.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(bi.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON, concat(bo.BRCD, '-', bo.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, sum(CASE WHEN bi.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(bi.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON, TRIM(bo.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 FROM BILL_OUTPUT bi INNER JOIN BILL_LEARNING_DATA bo ON bi.BASE_YM = bo.BASE_YM AND bi.TXBL_SRN = bo.TXBL_SRN AND bi.BRCD = bo.BRCD
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(bi.BASE_YM, 5) ) sub
